disk_bytes.description: Completed bytes reported by rTorrent; used as the displayed Data value.

up_total.description: Backward compatibility field; not used by the filters UI.

host.description: Reverse DNS PTR hostname when reverse_dns_enabled is enabled and a hostname is cached or resolved.

host_pending.description: True when a lightweight background PTR lookup was started but did not finish within the request budget.

generated_at_epoch.description: Unix timestamp when summary was generated.

profile_id.description: Optional rTorrent profile id for profile-scoped API operations. If omitted, the user active profile is used for backward compatibility; fallback profile id 1 is used only when no active profile exists and the user can access it.

profile_name.description: Optional rTorrent profile name for profile-scoped API operations. profile_id has priority when both are supplied.

apiKeyAuth.description: Optional per-user API token. Tokens are accepted only when PYTORRENT_AUTH_ENABLE=1. When auth is disabled, API endpoints do not require credentials.
apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key

bearerApiToken.description: Optional per-user API token in Authorization: Bearer <token>. Tokens are accepted only when PYTORRENT_AUTH_ENABLE=1.

sessionCookie.description: Optional Flask session cookie. Required only when PYTORRENT_AUTH_ENABLE=1 and no API token is used.
sessionCookie.name: session

ProfileId.name: profile_id
ProfileId.description: Optional rTorrent profile id for profile-scoped API operations. If omitted, the user active profile is used for backward compatibility; fallback profile id 1 is used only when no active profile exists and the user can access it.

ProfileName.name: profile_name
ProfileName.description: Optional rTorrent profile name for profile-scoped API operations. profile_id has priority when both are supplied.

post.description: Creates an application-level backup for admin users. Note: this endpoint is additive and does not change the legacy /api/backup behavior.
Creates a backup for the currently active rTorrent profile. Note: this endpoint keeps application-level backups separate from profile backups.

get.description: Returns automatic backup settings for the active profile. Note: this mirrors the profile-scoped backup UI controls.

post.description: Saves automatic backup settings for the active profile. Note: application backup settings remain unchanged.
Clears finished job logs, Smart Queue history, active-profile operation logs, Planner action history and automation history. Pending/running jobs, saved rules, settings and torrents are preserved.
Clears active profile runtime and database-backed caches without deleting torrents, settings, rules or logs.
Runs SQLite database vacuum/maintenance for admin users. Note: the cleanup summary is returned with the result.

post.description: Clears active-profile operation logs. Torrents, jobs, settings and rules are preserved.

Clears in-memory poller runtime counters for the active profile. Note: polling settings and torrent state are preserved.
